TarotPage.title: Situation. Challenge. Advice.
TarotPage.intro: Type your question first, draw a 3-card spread second, then let AI interpret it without pretending it gets to rewrite your truth window.
TarotPage.readingRuleText: Only the first spread in the chosen window counts as true. Every later spread in that same window is visible, but clearly marked as reflection only.
TarotPage.questionPlaceholder: Type your question here before drawing a spread...
